creator: j@ida.interface-business.de
text:
When selecting any of the screensavers in the sysinstall syscons setup
menu, you end up with an /etc/sysconfig with a screensaver installed,
but not in effect since there's no default timeout.

A discussion with Jordan yielded that there should be some default
whenever a screensaver is present...

How-To-Repeat: 
Install any version of FreeBSD, and select a screensaver in the
post-installation syscons configuration menu.  You won't see it get
in effect.
